pain_points: Manual buyer inquiry routing and property matching emails handled individually by 200+ independent brokers
Listing data entry and MLS sync done manually for hundreds of new properties per month
Lead follow-up and nurturing for unreplied buyer inquiries relies on individual broker initiative with zero centralized AI system
suggested_services: AI Lead Router — automatically match inbound buyer inquiries to matching property listings and assign to the right broker
AI Listing Ingestion Agent — parse new listing data from multiple MLS feeds and auto-populate broker CRM
AI Follow-Up Agent — send personalized nurture sequences to stale leads and notify brokers of reactivated interest
leads.source_note: One of Quebec's largest real estate brokerage networks with 200+ independent brokers; high broker admin burden = strong AI automation case. LinkedIn shows active hiring for marketing coordinator roles confirming growth activity.
leads.recommended_package: AI Workflow Automation ($1,500-$2,500) + AI Starter Setup

pain_points: Inbound buyer and seller inquiries handled manually by each agent with no centralized intake system

AI Listing Sync Agent — push new listings automatically to viacapitale.com and partner real estate portals
leads.source_note: Major Quebec real estate network with 150+ agents operating across Montreal; high administrative volume per agent = clear AI automation opportunity. Bilingual (FR/EN).
leads.recommended_package: AI Starter Setup ($750-$1,200) + AI Workflow Automation
